response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for both 'Fashion Monster' and 'Yumeiro Festival'. 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics were fully utilized for both songs. Manual transcription was used for vocal ad-libs (e.g., 'Soiya!', 'Let's go!') and prominent on-screen text during the interlude. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal onset. Aggressive truncation and zero-gap transitions were used during the high-tempo 'Yumeiro Festival' to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ルールに しばられたくはないの
subtitles.english: I don't want to be bound by rules

subtitles.original: わがまま ドキドキ

subtitles.original: 新衣装公開
subtitles.english: [Visual: New Outfit Reveal]

subtitles.original: 百鬼あやめ 登場
subtitles.english: [Visual: Nakiri Ayame enters]

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ 花よ 舞い踊れ
subtitles.english: Let the flowers bloom, let them dance

subtitles.original: 明日を虹色に染め上げて
subtitles.english: Coloring tomorrow in rainbow colors

subtitles.original: 夢色フェスティバル
subtitles.english: [Title: Yumeiro Festival]

subtitles.original: ソイヤ！ ソイヤ！
subtitles.english: Soiya! Soiya!

subtitles.original: はーどっこい！
subtitles.english: Ha-dokkoi!

subtitles.original: はっ！
subtitles.english: Ha!

subtitles.original: はっじまるぞー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: どっこいしょーどっこいしょ！
subtitles.english: Dokkoisho, dokkoisho!

subtitles.original: 今から歌うは ウルトラスーパー
subtitles.english: I'll sing it now, the ultra super

subtitles.original: いといとおかしの 夢色リズムさ
subtitles.english: Very, very charming Dream Color Rhythm

subtitles.original: 「おかし」な故にね 心惹かれるの
subtitles.english: Because it's "charming," I'm drawn to it

subtitles.original: まぁそんな噺は どうでもいいのさ
subtitles.english: Well, that story doesn't really matter

subtitles.original: 大事なるのは 楽しむこころ
subtitles.english: What's important is a heart that enjoys it

subtitles.original: 準備はいいかな? 遅れないでよね
subtitles.english: Are you ready? Don't be late

subtitles.original: あ! ちょい待ち!
subtitles.english: Ah! Wait a sec!

subtitles.original: 囃子輝く街に 靴紐結んで
subtitles.english: In the town with festive music, tie your laces

subtitles.original: 321で飛び出せ!
subtitles.english: Jump out at 3, 2, 1!

subtitles.original: ワクワクしたいの! ドキドキしたくない!?
subtitles.english: I want to be excited! Don't you want to be nervous!?

subtitles.original: ウキウキさせてよ! もういい?
subtitles.english: Make me feel lighthearted! Is that enough?

subtitles.original: いやいやまだまだ なんていうか止まらない?
subtitles.english: No, no, not yet, I can't stop?

subtitles.original: なんていうか止まれない!
subtitles.english: I mean, I can't stop!

subtitles.original: まだまだ明日の景色を見ていたくない?
subtitles.english: Don't you want to keep seeing tomorrow's scenery?

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ! 君もヨイサ!ヨイサ!
subtitles.english: Bloom proudly! You too, Yoisa! Yoisa!

subtitles.original: だから ここは最高のフェスティバル
subtitles.english: That's why this is the best festival

subtitles.original: 祭囃子リズムで ノリノリさ
subtitles.english: In high spirits with the festival music rhythm

subtitles.original: 笑顔満開➡︎無限大 It's Alright!
subtitles.english: Full bloom smiles to infinity, it's alright!

subtitles.original: 舞い踊れ! ひぃふぅみぃで 染め上げ
subtitles.english: Dance! Coloring it in with one, two, three

subtitles.original: 君色教えて 気になっちゃう color
subtitles.english: Tell me your color, the color I'm curious about

subtitles.original: そんな感じで 良いさ!良いさ!
subtitles.english: That's it, that's good! That's good!

subtitles.original: 夢のビート聴かせてよ
subtitles.english: Let me hear the dream beat

subtitles.original: 続けて歌うは ウルトラスーパー
subtitles.english: Next to sing is the ultra super

subtitles.original: いといとおかしの 夢色リズムさ
subtitles.english: Very, very charming Dream Color Rhythm

subtitles.original: もしかしましても さっきも言ったっけ?
subtitles.english: By any chance, did I say that already?

subtitles.original: まぁそんな噺は どうでもいいのさ
subtitles.english: Well, that story doesn't really matter

subtitles.original: 大事なるのは 信じるこころ
subtitles.english: What's important is a believing heart

subtitles.original: 君だけ聞こえる リズムに任せて
subtitles.english: Leave it to the rhythm only you can hear

subtitles.original: あ!ちょい待ち!
subtitles.english: Ah! Wait a sec!

subtitles.original: 星空きらめく街を
subtitles.english: The town where the starry sky sparkles

subtitles.original: もっともっと照らすくらい
subtitles.english: Enough to light it up more and more

subtitles.original: 321で飛び出せ!
subtitles.english: Jump out at 3, 2, 1!

subtitles.original: ワクワクしたいの! ドキドキしたくない!?
subtitles.english: I want to be excited! Don't you want to be nervous!?

subtitles.original: ウキウキさせてよ! もういい?
subtitles.english: Make me feel lighthearted! Is that enough?

subtitles.original: いやいやまだまだ なんていうか終わらない?
subtitles.english: No, no, not yet, it won't end?

subtitles.original: なんていうか終われない!
subtitles.english: I mean, it can't end!

subtitles.original: 今宵も夢色を抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embracing the dream colors tonight too

subtitles.original: いっくぞー！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ!君もソイヤ!ソイヤ!
subtitles.english: Bloom proudly! You too, Soiya! Soiya!

subtitles.original: だから ここは最高のフェスティバル
subtitles.english: That's why this is the best festival

subtitles.original: 曖昧なリズムに ドキドキさ
subtitles.english: My heart pounds to the vague rhythm

subtitles.original: 空に満開➡︎無限大 It's Alright!
subtitles.english: Full bloom in the sky to infinity, it's alright!

subtitles.original: 舞い上がれ!ひぃふぅみぃで染め上げ
subtitles.english: Soar! Coloring it in with one, two, three

subtitles.original: 君色教えて 内緒にする color
subtitles.english: Tell me your color, the secret color

subtitles.original: そんな感じで 良いさ!良いさ!
subtitles.english: That's it, that's good! That's good!
